title: Elbow Grease Pink Rubber Gloves | Super Strong, Cotton Lined, Non-Slip Household Gloves (Medium - 1 Pack)
features: SUPER STRONG & LONGER LASTING: Designed for durability, these super strong rubber gloves are perfect for tough cleaning jobs, from scrubbing kitchen counters to tackling bathroom grime.
SOFT COTTON LINING FOR COMFORT: The flocked cotton lining helps hands stay protected & comfortable. Protect skin from irritation when handling cleaning products. Comfortable when using hot water.

NON SLIP GRIP FOR SAFETY & CONTROL: Made from high quality rubber providing an improved grip, making it easier to handle wet dishes, bathroom cleaner bottles, and slippery surfaces without losing control.

FLEXIBLE & COMFORTABLE FIT: Flexible & tough for all cleaning jobs around the home. Available in medium and large sizes, these gloves offer a comfortable yet flexible fit, ensuring maximum dexterity and comfort. Check your glove size for the best fit.
IDEAL FOR BATHROOM & KITCHEN CLEANING: The Elbow Grease gloves provide the strength and protection needed for every cleaning task around the home. The only rubber gloves you'll ever need!

PRODUCT CARE: To maintain the gloves, keeping them in great condition, simply rinse with water after each use, wipe dry, and store, dry away from direct sunlight. Please note the gloves contain latex. Do not use if you have an allergy to latex.
PERFECT FOR ALL HOUSEHOLD CLEANING: These gloves are a reliable companion for all home cleaning from washing up, dusting, disinfecting surfaces to deep-cleaning the home or office
ESSENTIAL FOR ANY HOME CLEANING KIT: A must-have for every household, these reliable gloves make cleaning easier and more comfortable.

BRIGHT & EASY TO SPOT: The vibrant pink Elbow Grease design makes these faithful gloves easy to find in any cleaning cupboard, so they’re always within reach when it’s time to tackle household chores.
description: Product Description Elbow Grease Pink Rubber Gloves are a must-have for any home, offering flexibility and comfort for all household cleaning tasks. Made from a high-quality nitrile blend, these cleaning gloves are super strong and have a new longer lasting design, making them ideal for tackling even the toughest cleaning jobs. Whether you are scrubbing the sink, wiping down kitchen surfaces, or deep-cleaning the bathroom, these rubber gloves provide the grip and flexibility needed for effortless cleaning. The soft flocked cotton lining helps to keep skin dry and comfortable. The non-slip texture provides a secure grip, allowing for better control when handling cleaning tools, dishes or cleaning bottles . These long-lasting gloves are available in medium or large sizes, so you can choose the perfect fit. Elbow Grease Rubber Gloves are perfect for washing up and everyday household cleaning - their tough, flexible, and durable design makes them suitable for various tasks, from handling bathroom cleaners to scrubbing kitchen counters, or even a full house spring clean. Just rinse them with clean water after use, wipe them dry, and store. Please note the gloves contain latex. Do not use if you have an allergy to latex. them away from direct sunlight, to keep them in top condition. Ingredients WARNING: This product contains latex. Do not use if you have an allergy to latex. Keep out of reach of children.
